Patch release.

## Changed
- For an up-to-date `:latest` container, the bubble header now shows the resolved version number (e.g. **1.8.0**) instead of "latest".

Carries the v1.0.x fixes (DD.MM.YYYY dates, real version numbers, tag instead of digest hash in the header, tag-list pagination, DEPRECATED badge).

## Install / update

Unraid → **Plugins**. If you're on a date-versioned test build, **remove ShipLog and reinstall** (a date version looks newer than `1.0.x`):

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```

Verify the new files landed: `grep -c fmtDate /usr/local/emhttp/plugins/shiplog/scripts/docker.js` should print **1**. Then `curl -X POST http://localhost:8484/api/refresh` and hard-refresh the Docker tab.
